title: Wellness Coach (Chinatown)
description:
• The incumbent plays a vital role in delivering holistic care to our patients, extending beyond rehabilitation.
  • Develop, promote, and implement wellness initiatives and activities at the community dialysis center.
  • Oversee patient screenings, conduct physical assessments, compile and analyze data, and provide recommendations for follow-up care.
  • Conduct routine reviews to track patient adherence and progress in the exercise program, ensuring continuity of care plans.
  • Ensure proper maintenance, disinfection, and servicing of exercise and program equipment.
  • Monitor and manage patient attendance, ensuring accurate and timely documentation to support consistent program participation.
  • Work collaboratively with the Clinical Services Team to identify and address barriers to participation, ensuring patients receive adequate support in their wellness journey.
  • Support the planning and execution of volunteer events and social outings to empower and engage senior patients.

Requirements

  • Prefarable Diploma in Health Sciences (Health Management) or other relevant courses (e.g., sports sciences, therapy aide, community care associate).
  • Relevant working experience in a healthcare setting is advantageous.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.
